title: cynorkis spatulata
intro: Cynorkis spatulata, also known as the Yellow Spatulate Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynorkis spatulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
